title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXIX. Riddles.
content:
As I was going o'er Westminster bridge,
            I met with a Westminster scholar;
        He pulled off his cap an' drew off his glove,
            And wished me a very good morrow.
                What is his name?
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXIX. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
